_meta.dna: twin(cloud) = spawn(gcloud) x session(persist) x control(remote) x stream(visual) x auth(oauth3) x corporate(bypass) x cost(cap)
_meta.question_expansion_instruction: Each floor has 7 seed questions from a corporate user who cannot install software locally. Questions must verify that the cloud twin actually works end-to-end.

name: Tower of Cloud Twin Browser
protocol: FORECAST -> CROSS-REF -> AUDIT(7q) -> FIX -> VERIFY -> SEAL -> POSTMORTEM

floors.persona_context: 35, San Francisco, Senior Analyst at a Fortune 500 bank, Intermediate tech, cannot install any software on work laptop due to IT policy, needs to automate Gmail triage from personal device controlling cloud twin
questions: Can I log into solaceagi.com from any browser without installing anything and access a cloud twin browser?
Does the cloud twin dashboard show a Start Twin button that provisions a browser session in under 30 seconds?
Once the twin is running, can I see a live visual stream of what the twin browser is doing?
Can I run Gmail Inbox Triage through the cloud twin without my work laptop having Solace installed?
Does the twin session persist if I close my browser tab and reopen it within 30 minutes?
Is there a clear cost indicator showing how much the cloud twin session is costing me per minute?
Can I stop the twin session with one click and see a summary of what it accomplished?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Michael represents the core use case: corporate restriction prevents local install. Every question must verify the cloud twin works from a plain web browser on any device.

floors.persona_context: 29, New York, Product Manager at a tech startup, Expert tech, Pro tier subscriber, wants to understand how the twin is provisioned and what infrastructure backs it
questions: Does POST /api/v1/twin/start return a session_id and a websocket URL for the visual stream?
Is the twin browser running in an isolated Cloud Run container with its own Chromium instance?
Does the twin automatically install Playwright and required browser binaries on provisioning?
Can I specify which apps to pre-install on the twin when starting it?
Does GET /api/v1/twin/status return the current state (provisioning, ready, running, stopped)?
Is the twin session time-limited with automatic shutdown after 60 minutes of inactivity?
Does the twin use the same OAuth3 scoped consent as the local browser?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Sarah is technical and wants to understand the plumbing. Questions verify that real infrastructure exists, not just UI mocks.

floors.persona_context: 42, London, CISO at a healthcare company, Expert security, Enterprise tier, needs the cloud twin to meet compliance requirements before his team can use it
questions: Are twin browser sessions isolated from each other — can one user's twin access another's data?
Is the visual stream encrypted end-to-end (WSS not WS)?
Does the twin session get destroyed (container killed, disk wiped) when the user stops it?
Are twin session credentials (OAuth tokens, API keys) stored only in memory and never persisted to disk?
Does the twin produce the same SHA-256 evidence chain as the local browser?
Can I get an audit log of all twin sessions run by my team with timestamps and cost?
Does the twin enforce the same budget caps and human approval gates as local execution?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: David will block adoption if security is weak. Questions verify isolation, encryption, evidence, and compliance.

floors.persona_context: 26, Ho Chi Minh City, Junior developer and Quy's colleague, Beginner tech, Starter tier, just wants to use the twin from her phone during commute
questions: Can I start and control the twin from a mobile browser (phone) without a desktop?
Does the twin visual stream adapt to small screens without horizontal scrolling?
Can I approve or reject twin actions with a simple tap on mobile?
If my connection drops during commute, does the twin pause and resume when I reconnect?
Is there a simplified mobile view that shows just status and approval buttons?
Can I receive push notifications when the twin needs my approval?
Does the twin dashboard load in under 3 seconds on a 4G connection?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Lisa tests mobile-first cloud twin usage from Vietnam with potentially unreliable connectivity.

floors.persona_context: 50, Miami, CFO of a mid-size company, Non-technical, Pro tier, needs to understand and control the cost of running cloud twins for his 20-person team
questions: Is there a clear pricing page showing twin session cost (e.g., $0.05/minute or $X/hour)?
Can I set a monthly budget cap for twin usage per team member?
Does the billing dashboard show total twin cost this month separate from other Solace costs?
If a team member forgets to stop their twin, does it auto-shutdown after the budget is hit?
Is twin pricing competitive with alternatives (Browserless, Apify, etc.)?
Can I see a cost-per-task breakdown (e.g., Gmail triage via twin cost $0.12)?
Is there a free trial of the cloud twin for Pro subscribers to test before committing?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Robert controls the budget. Questions verify transparent pricing, cost controls, and competitive positioning.

floors.persona_context: 38, Stockholm, DevOps Engineer, Expert tech, Enterprise tier, wants to integrate cloud twin into CI/CD pipeline for automated testing
questions: Can I start a twin session via API (POST /api/v1/twin/start) with an API key and no browser UI?
Can I send commands to the twin programmatically (navigate, click, extract)?
Does the twin API support webhooks to notify my system when tasks complete?
Can I run multiple twin sessions in parallel for different tasks?
Is there a headless mode for the twin (no visual stream, lower cost)?
Can I schedule twin sessions to run at specific times via API?
Does the twin API return structured JSON results I can pipe into my data pipeline?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Anika wants API-first twin access for automation. Questions verify programmatic control.

floors.persona_context: 33, Chicago, CTO of a SaaS company, Expert tech, Enterprise tier, evaluating whether to recommend cloud twin vs local install to his 50-person engineering team
questions: Is there a comparison page showing cloud twin vs local install: features, cost, latency, privacy?
Does the cloud twin run the exact same apps and recipes as the local browser?
Is there a hybrid mode where the local browser delegates heavy tasks to the cloud twin?
What is the added latency of cloud twin vs local execution (measured in seconds)?
Can a team mix local and cloud twin users on the same Enterprise account?
Does the cloud twin support all 23 languages like the local browser?
Is there an SLA for cloud twin uptime (e.g., 99.9%)?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: James is making a buy/build decision for 50 engineers. Questions verify parity, performance, and enterprise readiness.
